mnemonics.title: Address Format
mnemonics.explanation: Logical address is (segment number, offset within segment)

mnemonics.title: Translation Check
mnemonics.explanation: First check offset < limit, then physical = base + offset

mnemonics.title: Segmentation Fragmentation
mnemonics.explanation: Variable-size segments cause external; fixed-size pages cause internal fragmentation

quickRecall: Protection bits: R, W, X per segment
